description: You are a cybersecurity researcher setting up Tor Browser to inspect web traffic via an intercepting proxy and to enforce strict TLS settings. Import the custom proxy certificate located at /home/ga/Documents/ProxyRootCA.crt, ensuring it is trusted to identify websites. Export the built-in 'ISRG Root X1' certificate to /home/ga/Documents/ISRG_Root_Backup.crt. Additionally, configure the browser preferences to set security.tls.version.min to 3 and security.cert_pinning.enforcement_level to 2.
